title: Senior Doctor - Philips India Healthcare Capital India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Philips India Healthcare Capital India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? Philips India Healthcare Capital India in Nashik offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Philips India Healthcare Capital India:
Philips India Healthcare Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Philips India Healthcare Capital India!
